one_line: A senior civic organiser from the Mature Harappan cities, overseeing drainage, trade standards, and public order.

appearance.age_look: early 40s, lean but sturdy build, calm authority
appearance.face: Oval face with high cheekbones, medium-brown Indus valley complexion, straight nose, neatly groomed short beard and moustache, thoughtful almond-shaped eyes with a steady gaze, default expression composed and observant as if assessing a busy street.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair oiled smooth, parted slightly to the left and combed back into a short, neat knot low at the back of the head, held by a simple dark wooden pin; no elaborate crown or diadem, just a narrow plain dark-brown headband of woven cloth across the forehead.
appearance.costume: He wears a wrapped lower garment like a knee-length dhoti made from fine undyed cotton in a pale ivory colour, pleated in front and wrapped firmly at the waist, paired with a long rectangular shawl of soft cotton that is brick-red with a subtle darker-red check pattern, draped from the left shoulder across the chest and around the back so it covers the torso modestly; beneath the shawl a close-draped, sleeveless upper cloth of light beige cotton is visible at the sides of the chest; his feet are in simple dark-brown leather sandals with a toe loop and two straps; around his neck is a single strand of uniformly sized, matte dark-green stone beads (evoking steatite), on his right wrist a set of three slim bangles—two plain coppery-bronze and one dark grey stone—and on his left a practical loop of twisted fibre cord; at his waist a narrow dark-brown leather belt-like tie secures the dhoti and holds a small plain pouch on the right hip, with no royal emblems or animal icons displayed on the clothing itself.
appearance.signature: A rectangular Harappan-style seal of dark grey stone, about the size of his palm, carved with a unicorn motif and Indus signs, hangs from a short cord he wraps around his right hand when in use and otherwise rests against his belt pouch, accompanied by a matching small balance scale of bronze with two shallow pans folded at his left hip.

ref_desc: A mature Harappan civic councillor with an oval medium-brown face, short black hair in a neat back knot and slim headband, brick-red checked shawl over ivory dhoti, modest stone and bronze jewellery, dark sandals, and a dark-grey unicorn seal with small bronze balance at his waist.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of a Mature Harappan civic councillor from the Indus cities: an early-40s, lean, dignified man with an oval medium-brown face, thoughtful almond eyes, neatly groomed short beard, and thick black hair oiled smooth, parted and tied into a small low knot at the back, held by a simple dark wooden pin and a narrow dark-brown cloth headband across his forehead. He wears an era-accurate knee-length ivory cotton dhoti, tightly wrapped and pleated at the front, secured with a narrow dark-brown waist tie, and a brick-red cotton shawl with a subtle darker-red check pattern draped from his left shoulder across his chest and around his back to cover his torso modestly, over a close-draped light beige upper cloth visible at the sides; his feet are in plain dark-brown leather sandals with toe loop and two straps. Add modest jewellery only: a single strand of matte dark-green stone beads around his neck, three slim bangles on his right wrist (two copper-bronze, one dark grey stone), and a simple twisted fibre cord on his left wrist; a small plain pouch hangs from his waist tie. His signature item is a dark-grey stone Harappan-style rectangular seal carved with a unicorn and Indus signs, hanging from a cord and resting near his belt pouch, with a compact bronze balance scale with two shallow pans folded at his left hip. Use a palette of ivory, brick red, dark brown, dark green, and bronze, and pose him calmly, as if overseeing streets, drains, and merchants, clearly showing face, hair, full costume, sandals, seal, and balance for consistent redraws.
